meta.mission: The first AI trading platform that trades like a football team.
meta.one_liner: Watch our striker squad find setups on real markets — every decision explained, every risk gated.

roles.title: CTO
roles.current_task: Architecture review of HQ dashboard route

roles.title: Head of Product
roles.current_task: Sprint 0 charter authored; F001–F005 specs locked

roles.title: Brand / Content Designer
roles.current_task: Founding copy library seed at company/brand/copy.md (planned)

roles.title: Frontend Engineer
roles.current_task: HQ_PAGE dashboard drafted, awaiting Sprint 0 build kickoff

roles.title: Backend Engineer
roles.current_task: agent/platform/hq.py drafted for HQ dashboard data

roles.title: AI / ML Engineer
roles.current_task: Standby — F002 needs striker stats; will activate mid-Sprint 0

roles.title: DevOps Engineer
roles.current_task: Standby — Sprint 0 ships locally; DevOps activates Sprint 1+

roles.title: QA Engineer
roles.current_task: QA plans pending for F001–F005; 3 HQ dashboard tests drafted

roles.title: Marketing
roles.current_task: F003 (research page) copy framing to review post-build

roles.title: Customer Support
roles.current_task: Standby — activates when first user signs up (Sprint 1+)

roles.title: Legal
roles.current_task: F001 disclaimer draft pending; F003 verdict-page IP note pending

roles.title: Finance
roles.current_task: Standby — no spend authorised yet; activates when first shopping list surfaces

sprints.name: Trust Foundation
sprints.goal: Ship the 5 features that turn the prototype into something showable to prospects.

history.note: Spec locked by founding-team pass.
Trust-in-10-seconds framing; three JTBD questions drive KPI-tile ordering.
Desktop + 375px mobile mocks; F004 baked in. New primitives .kpi-tile / .per-pair-table / .disclaimer / .source-hint reused by F002/F003.
Read-only parser module + page + 2 routes; 3 modules touched (under CTO-handoff threshold).
Parser + PERFORMANCE_PAGE + routes; 48 new tests (24 module + 16 page + 8 api). Platform suite 100 -> 170.
pass -- 48 new tests green; cold-start + seeded + mobile-media-query manual checks pass.
pass -- disclaimer library seeded; claim register covers 4 public numbers with per-number code-path traces.
CPO signoff -- security correctly skipped (public page, no auth, no user data).
Ship-in-place: /performance + /api/performance/state live in local dev server; public deploy deferred to Sprint 1+ (DevOps activation).
Spec locked; IP note flagged for Legal.
Two segments framed (prospect + casual reader). JTBD ordering locked. Non-goals ratified.
Reuses F001 primitives; adds .player-card + .player-header + .setup-diagram. Retired card at 65% opacity + status pills use colour AND text.
10 stranger-friend bios written; zero uses of ensemble/aggregator; character-name spellings pinned to copy.md.

Backend module (players.py) + PLAYERS_INDEX_PAGE + player_detail_page(id, name) + players_not_found_page + routes for /players + /players/<id> + /api/players/list + /api/players/<id>. 70 new tests. Platform suite 170 -> 240.
pass -- 70 new tests + full platform suite green. 10 bio pages render at desktop + 375px; 404 shell verified.
pass -- IP posture cleared; disclaimer verbatim on every user-visible surface; fallback naming plan documented.
CPO signoff -- security skipped (public page, no auth); CEO end-of-sprint dogfood pass will re-verify with a stranger-friend test.
Ship-in-place: /players + 10 detail routes + APIs live in local dev server.
Spec locked; renders Phase AC verdicts read-only from research repo.
'Sceptical prospect' JTBD -- 'help me falsify this before I trust it'. Dead-first ordering ratified as the trust move. FDR explainer specified as native <details>.
Timeline layout with sticky month headers. Two new primitives (.verdict-card, .date-header); rest reuse HQ/F001/F002 tokens. Five verdict-pill colour families cover 14 verdict_kind values.
Anti-marketing preamble + FDR explainer prose + six verdict_label/brand_summary/headline_stat strings locked. Copy reads at ~7th-grade level per Flesch.

CPO-gated publication manifest signed off. Six entries approved: three alive_survivor (E001, E004, E007), one dead (E022), one fail (E024), one stopped (phase_ac_pitch_assignment) -- 50 % receipt-trail ratio.

Backend parses REPORT.md files under sibling repo experiments/ + programs/**/experiments/; only manifest-allow-listed rows emitted. RESEARCH_PAGE consumes F005 withStates() helper. 46 new tests (23 module + 17 page + 6 api). Platform suite 240 -> 286.
pass -- 46 new tests + full platform suite green. Cold start, missing sibling repo, missing manifest, mobile 375 px, FDR explainer accessibility, and read-only invariant all clean.

pass -- anti-cherry-pick claim substantiated (3 of 6 non-passing). FDR explainer prose accurate. Three rolling constraints logged (cherry-pick guardrail, portfolio claim ban, new-verdict-kind handshake).
CPO signoff -- security correctly skipped (public page, no auth, no user data).
Ship-in-place: /research + /api/research/verdicts live in local dev server; missing sibling repo -> friendly source_exists=false payload.
Spec locked; covers hub + /v1 + /v2 + /hq + /performance + /players + /research.

Baked inline into F001/F002/F003 mocks as they landed. Handoff closes out the horizontal concern with three residual asks: nav flex-wrap into _BASE_CSS, base-level 700 px media query, and a smoke test to guard the invariants forever.

_BASE_CSS ships .nav flex-wrap:wrap + @media (max-width: 700px) body padding tighten + #updated inline pin. Every pre-existing page (HUB / V1 / V2 / HQ) inherits automatically via __BASE_CSS__ substitution. 62-test smoke suite locks the invariants. Platform suite 286 -> 348.
pass -- 62 new tests + full suite green. Manual 375 px sweep across 10 route variants cleared. No P0 mobile defects surfaced.
CPO signoff -- security + legal correctly skipped per fast-path (no new surface, just responsive CSS).
Ship-in-place: CSS-only diff to _BASE_CSS + one new test module. Every route on the platform now clears the 375 px bar.
Spec locked; horizontal concern across every fetch on every page.
Fast path per review-chain.md: skeleton dimensions pinned to containers, error/empty states distinct.
Error copy library seeded (8 canonical keys + per-page empty variants). copy.md also seeded per D008.
_SKELETON_CSS + _ERROR_COPY_JS + _WITH_STATES_JS + 3 new nav pills.
pass -- 19 new tests, full platform suite green (119).
CPO signoff -- security + legal correctly skipped per review-chain.md fast-path (no auth, no user data, no public claim).
Ship-in-place: helper is code-only, imported by F001/F002/F003 pages that consume it.

decisions.decision: Founded Blue Lock Trading Co.
decisions.context: See company/README.md. Kicks off Sprint 0. CEO (Fiyin) retains ultimate authority; 'The Ego' persona is the executor.

decisions.decision: Sprint 0 scope locked: F001–F005 (Trust Foundation).
decisions.context: See company/sprints/sprint-0-trust-foundation/README.md. Target end 2026-08-04. Exit gates: 5 P0 features shipped, tests green, HQ dashboard reflects final state.

decisions.decision: HQ dashboard route (/hq) and API (/api/hq/state) architecture green-lit.
decisions.context: New module agent/platform/hq.py (read-only over company/ledger/company_state.json). HUB_PAGE gains a 4th tile linking to /hq. 3 platform tests added. See PROTOCOL and agent/platform/pages.py for details.

decisions.decision: Ten of 17 roles active for Sprint 0; seven on standby.
decisions.context: Active: CEO, CTO, CPO, UX Researcher, UI Designer, Brand Designer, Frontend, Backend, QA, Marketing, Legal. Standby: AI/ML (activates for F002 stats), DevOps, Security, Sales, Support, Finance.

decisions.decision: Dogfood cadence for Sprint 0 = end-of-sprint only.
decisions.context: No fixed day-7 mid-sprint gate; CPO has autonomy to schedule ad-hoc walk-throughs if a feature crosses into review stage early.

decisions.decision: F002 ships all 10 strikers with retired / standby pills.
decisions.context: Historical record (including Kunigami retired and Sae disabled-by-default) is part of the Blue Lock metaphor's credibility. UI Designer + Brand Designer own the pill design + copy so it reads as narrative history.

decisions.decision: F003 verdict summaries are CPO-gated, never auto-published.
decisions.context: Backend parser may stage summaries in company/research/, but publication to /research requires an explicit CPO signoff entry in the decisions log. The /research page is anti-marketing marketing precisely because a human curates the narrative.

decisions.decision: Brand copy library at company/brand/copy.md and company/brand/error_copy.md.
decisions.context: Brand Designer owns these files as Sprint 0 deliverables produced during F001 and F005 design stages. Every user-facing string cites a line in copy.md (or logs an inline exception).

decisions.decision: Finance stays at zero-authority-spend through Sprint 0.
decisions.context: First shopping list surfaces in Sprint 2 (market-data / broker sandbox) or Sprint 6 (domain / hosting / mailer). CEO ratifies before any spend; Finance produces vendor shortlist + spend memo.

decisions.decision: HQ dashboard inherits default auth: open on localhost, token-gated on public.
decisions.context: Mirrors /, /v1, /v2. Revisit in Sprint 2 (Access) when per-user auth lands — the Finance section on /hq may need admin-only gating then.

decisions.decision: F005 fast-pathed through the review chain (spec → design → build → qa → signoff → ship).
decisions.context: Per review-chain.md eligibility, F005 satisfies all fast-path criteria (no auth, no user data, no dep). Research and architecture stages waived; security and legal correctly skipped (no public claim, no third-party name). 19 new tests, 119 platform-suite total.

decisions.decision: Error copy library seeded with 8 canonical keys plus per-page empty-state variants.
decisions.context: company/brand/error_copy.md + company/brand/copy.md land per D008. Canonical keys mirror the F005 helper's DEFAULT_ERROR_MAP; F001/F002/F003 pages reference this file rather than inlining custom copy.

decisions.decision: Platform nav pills extended from 4 to 7 (added Performance / Squad / Research).
decisions.context: nav() accepts three new active-name values ('performance', 'players', 'research'). Existing tests locked the four pre-existing pills; new tests lock all seven. F001/F002/F003 pages register nav('performance'|'players'|'research') respectively.

decisions.decision: F005 shipped -- helper landed and consumed downstream by F001/F002/F003.
decisions.context: Ship-in-place: no separate deploy artefact because the helper is code-only (agent/platform/pages.py constants). CEO signoff is captured under the sprint-level end-of-sprint dogfood pass (D005) rather than a per-feature ceremony, as F005 has no user-facing surface of its own.

decisions.decision: F001 handed off from spec to UX Researcher; security stage skipped, legal stage required.
decisions.context: Public read-only performance page has no auth surface, so security review is not triggered. Regulated performance-numbers surface requires legal review. See company/handoffs/F001-cpo-to-ux_researcher.json.

decisions.decision: F001 user-journey framed as 'trust in 10 seconds' with three JTBD questions above the fold.
decisions.context: Three questions (days live / net direction / worst loss) drive KPI-tile ordering. Non-goals declared: per-striker attribution (F002), CSV export (Sprint 3+), benchmark overlay (Sprint 3+). See company/research/F001-user-journey.md.

decisions.decision: F001 mocks ship desktop + 375px mobile in one pass; F004 baked in, not retrofitted.
decisions.context: Reusable primitives introduced (.kpi-tile / .per-pair-table / .disclaimer / .source-hint) so F002/F003 can copy. Palette re-uses existing _BASE_CSS tokens. See company/design/F001-mocks.md.

decisions.decision: F001 architecture: pure parser module + page + 2 routes; 3 modules touched (under CTO-handoff threshold).
decisions.context: agent/platform/performance.py is read-only over v1 daily logs and v2 events.jsonl. HQ tile-count grows from 5 to 8 in this sprint (Performance + Squad + Research). F002/F003 frontend must serialise on pages.py. See company/handoffs/F001-cto-to-frontend.json.

decisions.decision: F001 build complete -- /performance + /api/performance/state live, 48 new tests green.
decisions.context: Cold-start renders via F005 helper's empty state; Sharpe below 30-day floor renders 'n/a - need N more days'. Test counts: module 24 + page 16 + api 8 = 48. Platform suite 100 -> 170. See company/handoffs/F001-frontend-to-qa.json.

decisions.decision: F001 QA verdict = pass; two regression-risk items flagged forward.
decisions.context: 48 new tests green + full platform suite green. Regression-risk items: v1 log-line format drift (parser drops silently), Sharpe-floor constant needs UX + module co-changes. See company/qa/F001-verdict.md.

decisions.decision: F001 disclaimer review = pass; disclaimer library seeded with claim register.
decisions.context: company/legal/disclaimers.md publishes canonical library. Claim register logs 4 public numbers (trades_total / net_pips / worst_dd_pips / sharpe_or_null) with per-number code-path traces. See company/legal/F001-disclaimer-review.md.

decisions.decision: F001 shipped -- /performance live; ledger advances to features_shipped_sprint_0 = 2.
decisions.context: CEO signoff under D005 end-of-sprint cadence plus per-feature legal + QA passes. Ship-in-place because DevOps is on standby (Sprint 1+). See company/handoffs/F001-legal-to-ceo.json.

decisions.decision: F002 handed off from spec to UX Researcher; security stage skipped, legal stage required (IP disclaimer).
decisions.context: Public read-only bio pages have no auth surface. Character-name usage triggers Legal's third-party-name-usage disclaimer surface. See company/handoffs/F002-cpo-to-ux_researcher.json.

decisions.decision: F002 user-journey memo framed two segments (prospect from /v2, casual reader from search) and ordered JTBD questions.
decisions.context: Detail-page JTBD ordering: who / setup / behaviour / recent / evolution. Non-goals ratified (no editable notes, no comparison view, no P&L chart). Accessibility: colour + text on status pills, aria-labels on setup diagrams. See company/research/F002-user-journey.md.

decisions.decision: F002 mocks reuse F001 primitives; new .player-card / .player-header / .setup-diagram; retired card at 65% opacity.
decisions.context: Palette stays inside _BASE_CSS tokens. Status pills use both colour AND text label -- colour-blind users still see 'retired' / 'active' / 'standby'. Signature-setup ASCII lives in overflow-x:auto so it scrolls horizontally on mobile. See company/design/F002-mocks.md.

decisions.decision: 10 stranger-friend striker bios written; zero uses of 'ensemble'/'aggregator'; spellings pinned to copy.md.
decisions.context: company/roster/players/*.md ships all 10 bios (Isagi, Bachira, Rin, Chigiri, Reo, Nagi, Barou, Karasu, Sae, Kunigami). Each has header meta + Playstyle prose + Signature setup + Evolution history sections. Sae marked disabled-by-default; Kunigami marked retired-from-proposing.

decisions.decision: AI/ML sign-off on bios -- weapon strings match roster.py; playstyle prose accurately describes actual agent behaviour.
decisions.context: Bios cross-referenced against agent/squad/agents/aXX_<name>.py canonical roles and weapon constants. See company/handoffs/F002-ai_ml-to-frontend.json.

decisions.decision: F002 architecture: 3 modules touched (players.py + pages.py + serve_platform.py); no separate CTO-handoff needed.
decisions.context: Fast-path per protocols/review-chain.md architecture-review criterion (>3 modules triggers explicit CTO handoff; F002 stays at 3 exactly). Read-only invariant enforced: neither company/roster/players/ nor squad_live/events.jsonl is written by any endpoint. See company/design/F002-mocks.md 'sign-off' section.

decisions.decision: F002 build complete -- /players + 10 detail pages + APIs live, 70 new tests green.
decisions.context: PLAYERS_INDEX_PAGE + player_detail_page(id, name) factory + players_not_found_page(known_ids) added. Routes cover case-insensitive + canon-variant + trailing-slash. Test counts: module 29 + page 24 + api 17 = 70. Platform suite 170 -> 240. See company/handoffs/F002-frontend-to-qa.json.

decisions.decision: F002 QA verdict = pass; two regression-risk items flagged forward.
decisions.context: 70 new tests green + full platform suite green. Manual verification: 10 bio pages at desktop + 375px, 404 shell, cold-start + seeded, disclaimer verbatim. Regression risks: bio markdown format drift + agent_key wire-format drift. See company/qa/F002-verdict.md.

decisions.decision: F002 IP posture cleared for Sprint 0 with a re-audit gate before any Sprint 6+ paid surface.
decisions.context: Nominative-use / commentary framing documented in company/legal/blue-lock-ip-notice.md. Fallback naming plan (10 generic labels) estimated at a one-day migration. Claim register updated. See company/legal/F002-disclaimer-review.md.

decisions.decision: F002 shipped -- 10 bio routes live; ledger advances to features_shipped_sprint_0 = 3.
decisions.context: CEO signoff under D005 end-of-sprint cadence plus per-feature legal + QA passes. See company/handoffs/F002-legal-to-ceo.json.

decisions.decision: F003 handed off from spec to UX Researcher; security stage skipped, legal stage required (anti-cherry-pick + FDR framing).
decisions.context: Public read-only verdict timeline has no auth surface, but the anti-marketing marketing thesis needs Legal to substantiate every public claim. See company/handoffs/F003-cpo-to-ux_researcher.json.

decisions.decision: F003 target segment = 'sceptical prospect'; content order flipped to dead-first as the trust move.
decisions.context: JTBD: 'help me falsify this before I trust it'. Dead / stopped / fail cards visually equivalent to alive cards -- no down-weighting. FDR explainer is a native <details> block, collapsed by default. Non-goals: no live equity claim on this page; no per-experiment PROTOCOL.md rendering. See company/research/F003-user-journey.md.

decisions.decision: F003 mocks: timeline with sticky month headers; two new primitives (.verdict-card, .date-header); rest reuse HQ/F001/F002 tokens.
decisions.context: Five verdict-pill colour families cover the 14 kinds the parser emits (alive_survivor/pass/complete + dead/fail + stopped/parked + in_progress + unknown). Mobile 700 px breakpoint: verdict pill wraps above title, date drops to a new line. See company/design/F003-mocks.md.

decisions.decision: F003 publication_manifest.json signed off with six approved entries.
decisions.context: Per D007 CPO-gate. Six entries: E001_concept_ablation (alive), E004_walk_forward (alive), E007_impulse_origin_bounce (alive), E022_structure_aware_tp_snap (dead), E024_near_tp_stall_exit (fail), phase_ac_pitch_assignment (stopped). 3 of 6 non-passing preserves the receipt-trail thesis. See company/research/publication_manifest.json.

decisions.decision: F003 backend module (agent/platform/research.py) walks two disk regions: experiments/ + programs/**/experiments/.
decisions.context: REPORT.md is canonical -- REPORT 2.md drift copies are skipped. campaign_id extracted from the full parent-directory name (e.g. 'E001_concept_ablation') so it matches publication_manifest.json keys. Verdict-line regex is multiline-flagged to catch 'Status: complete' mid-line.

decisions.decision: F003 build complete -- /research + /api/research/verdicts live, 46 new tests green.
decisions.context: RESEARCH_PAGE consumes the F005 withStates() helper. Missing sibling repo -> source_exists=false payload (never a 500); missing manifest -> unconfigured=true empty state. Test counts: module 23 + page 17 + api 6 = 46. Platform suite 240 -> 286. See company/handoffs/F003-frontend-to-qa.json.

decisions.decision: F003 QA verdict = pass; three regression-risk items flagged forward.
decisions.context: 46 new tests green + full platform suite green. Manual verification: cold start + missing repo + missing manifest + mobile 375 px + FDR explainer accessibility + read-only invariant. Regression risks: sibling repo REPORT.md format drift, manifest / disk mismatch (entry without matching REPORT.md silently dropped), publication side-channel via list_all(). See company/qa/F003-verdict.md.

decisions.decision: F003 legal review = pass; claim register updated; three rolling constraints logged.
decisions.context: Anti-cherry-pick claim substantiated (3 of 6 non-passing). FDR explainer prose cross-checked against research repo's fdr_protocol doc. Rolling constraints: (1) cherry-pick guardrail -- <33 % non-passing triggers re-review, (2) whole-portfolio claim ban, (3) new verdict_kind requires legal handshake. See company/legal/F003-disclaimer-review.md.

decisions.decision: F003 shipped -- /research live; ledger advances to features_shipped_sprint_0 = 4.
decisions.context: CEO signoff under D005 end-of-sprint cadence plus per-feature legal + QA passes. Ship-in-place because DevOps is on standby. See company/handoffs/F003-legal-to-ceo.json.

decisions.decision: [SPEC-EXTENSION] serve_platform.make_handler() gains research_root + research_manifest_path kwargs.
decisions.context: F003 spec did not pin how the sibling repo's location is discovered. Chose to derive research_root from --research-reviews' parents (the review-cache dir sits three levels deep inside the repo). New kwargs default to None; missing repo renders the friendly source_exists=false empty state. F003 spec file updated in-place with the derivation note.

decisions.decision: F004 hoisted .nav flex-wrap + a 700 px media query into _BASE_CSS so every page inherits mobile-responsive nav automatically.
decisions.context: F004 was baked into F001/F002/F003 as they landed, but a smoke test surfaced two residual gaps: V1_PAGE lacked any @media block and .nav wasn't flex-wrap. Both fixed at the base-CSS level so HUB/V1/V2/HQ get the mobile pass 'for free'. 62-test smoke suite locks the invariants forever. Platform suite 286 -> 348.

decisions.decision: F004 shipped -- 375 px bar cleared across all 7 required routes; ledger advances to features_shipped_sprint_0 = 5.
decisions.context: CEO signoff under D005 end-of-sprint cadence plus per-feature QA pass above. F004 fast-path complete: security + legal correctly skipped (no new surface, just responsive CSS). See company/handoffs/F004-qa-to-cpo.json.

decisions.decision: Sprint 0 (Trust Foundation) verdict: COMPLETE. All 5 P0 features shipped in ~4 hours honest wall-clock.
decisions.context: F005 -> F001 -> F002 -> F003 -> F004 landed in a single Sprint 0 Executor session. Final test count 348 platform tests (up from 100 pre-sprint), 42 review-chain handoff JSONs, 45 decision entries in the ledger. HQ dashboard now reflects 5/5 features_shipped. Sprint 1 (Access) is the next lane: broker connection wizard + real user accounts + first-time setup flow. See company/sprints/sprint-0-trust-foundation/REPORT.md for the post-mortem.

decisions.decision: Sprint 0 formally signed off -- 5/5 features accepted.
decisions.context: Independent post-sprint verification: 971 tests green (946 non-vaults + 24 vaults + 1 skipped), ledger sprints[0].verdict=COMPLETE, /hq Kanban 5/5 in ship, blockers empty. Trust Foundation on record.

decisions.decision: Ratified retro protocol improvements #1/#2/#4/#5 (F005-first, spec-lock, Legal audit, _BASE_CSS versioning).
decisions.context: Amendments land in company/protocols/review-chain.md as Sprint 1's first commit.

decisions.decision: Mandatory security tests for auth-adjacent features from Sprint 1 onwards.
decisions.context: auth:true or credentials:true features require tests/security/test_<feature>.py with (a) auth-bypass, (b) credential-storage-at-rest, (c) input-fuzz. Security persona = mandatory reviewer, handoff BEFORE QA.

decisions.decision: Sprint 1 kick-off held pending explicit CEO green-light.
decisions.context: Higher-stakes lane (money-adjacent, auth-adjacent); retro recommended executor-split. CEO input required on (a) decomposition, (b) Finance activation timing, (c) dogfood-before-continue.

sprint_verdicts.notes: Fully autonomous run under the Sprint 0 Executor persona. Every stage transition landed on the ledger before proceeding; every handoff has a JSON on tape; HQ dashboard accurate to the second at close.
